items.title: Scalpers circle AMD's Ryzen 7 5800X3D 10th Anniversary Edition, asking for $600 or more — re-released CPU sees inconsistent inventory on release day
items.description: Scalpers are trying to capitalize on the release of the Ryzen 7 5800X3D 10th Anniversary Edition, asking nearly double the CPU's suggested retail price.
items.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 3 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Subscribe to our newsletter Scalpers are moving in on AMD's Ryzen 7 5800X3D 10th Anniversary Edition. The new CPU, which is identical to the original but "re-engineered" for a new bonding process, is on sale officially today, June 29. We've been keeping track of inventory and haven't seen the chip available for more than a few minutes — and amid the flurry, scalpers are stepping in and asking for $600 or more for the chip on the secondhand market, sometimes doubling the CPU's $350 MSRP.Go deeper with TH Premium: CPU (Image credit: Tom's Hardware)CPU scaling with DLSSRyzen to the top: How AMD innovated in the gaming CPU marketHow ARM is working its way into PCsAMD CES 2026 gaming trends press Q&A roundtable transcriptOver on eBay, most listings for the chip are above $600, with some asking for $750 or more. Worse, they've sold for that price. Looking at sold listings, at least two of the CPUs sold today, one for $540 and another for $585. Most of the listings just use the stock product photo, but some scalpers have an actual CPU in-hand.Micro Center has the chip available for sale, though only as part of a bundle with a motherboard and RAM, and it's exclusively available in Micro Center stores. Presumably some scalpers went to buy a chip at Micro Center this morning to flip it on eBay in the afternoon.Latest Videos FromWatch full video here: Although it's easy to get caught up in the rush of a new release (or old release, in this case), we don't recommend giving into scalper prices. Rumors have circulated that the 10th Anniversary Edition is a limited-time run, but that's not the case. AMD says it plans on continuing to make the CPU, so we should see inventory stabilize eventually.We have some placeholder listings available. Again, we've seen inconsistent inventory throughout the morning, so check back at these retailers regularly: You may like Ryzen 7 5800X3D AM4 10th Anniversary Edition surfaces online for $310 AMD to resurrect Ryzen 7 5800X3D AM4 with 10th anniversary edition, leaker claims AMD brings back Ryzen 7 5800X3D, launches Ryzen 7 7700X3D to combat rising component prices 5800X3D 10th Anniversary Edition at Newegg5800X3D 10th Anniversary Edition at Best Buy5800X3D 10th Anniversary Edition at B&HWe've been checking retailer listings all morning, and we've only briefly seen the chip in stock. Online, some buyers claim they've secured a CPU through Newegg, but we haven't been able to successfully move through the checkout process yet. We also haven't seen the chip go live on AMD's direct web store yet.Because of that, it looks like retailers are doing something of a staggered rollout. There's a good chance we'll see more inventory released throughout the day, so make sure to check back at retailers.Stay On the Cutting Edge: Get the Tom's Hardware NewsletterGet Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox.Contact me with news and offers from other Future brandsReceive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsorsWe just re-reviewed the Ryzen 7 5800X3D to evaluate how the CPU stacks up to the current market at its new $350 suggested retail price. If you already have an AM4 motherboard and memory to go with the CPU, it's a good choice at $350. Otherwise, there are better options.AMD's newer Ryzen 7 7600X3D is just as fast in applications, despite sporting fewer cores, and it's around 15% faster in games. Meanwhile, Intel's Core i7-14700K paired with DDR4 matches the 5800X3D in games and offers around twice the multithreaded performance. With DDR5, the Core i7-14700K wins across the board. Follow Tom's Hardware on Google News, or add us as a preferred source, to get our latest news, analysis, & reviews in your feeds.
items.author: Jake Roach
items.titleZh: 黄牛围猎AMD锐龙7 5800X3D十周年纪念版，要价600美元或更高——重新发布的CPU在发布日库存不稳定
items.descriptionZh:
AMD 今日正式开售 Ryzen 7 5800X3D 十周年纪念版处理器，这款芯片本质上是原版 Ryzen 7 5800X3D 的重新封装版本，采用新的键合工艺制造，但核心规格与性能参数完全一致。官方建议零售价为 350 美元。然而，上市仅数小时，该处理器便遭遇严重抢购，库存迅速告罄，黄牛党随即在二手市场大肆炒作，eBay 上的标价普遍超过 600 美元，部分高达 750 美元，甚至已有以 540 美元和 585 美元成交的记录。Micro Center 虽然提供该芯片，但仅限店内以主板+内存捆绑套餐形式销售，这进一步加剧了线上渠道的稀缺性。

从技术原理来看，Ryzen 7 5800X3D 的核心创新在于其 3D V-Cache 技术，通过垂直堆叠额外的 64MB L3 缓存（总计 96MB），显著降低游戏场景中的内存延迟，提升数据命中率。十周年纪念版与此前版本完全一致，只是 AMD 针对新的键合工艺进行了重新工程化设计，以确保长期供应稳定性。AMD 已明确表示这款处理器并非限时生产，而是计划持续量产，因此库存预计将逐步恢复稳定。

性能方面，Tom's Hardware 近期重新评测了 Ryzen 7 5800X3D 在当前市场环境下的表现。在 350 美元价位上，如果用户已有 AM4 主板和 DDR4 内存，它仍然是一个高性价比的游戏选择。但若需要全新搭建平台，则存在更优选项：AMD 自家的 Ryzen 7 7600X3D 尽管核心数更少，应用性能与之持平，游戏性能却高出约 15%；而 Intel 的 Core i7-14700K 搭配 DDR4 内存在游戏中与 5800X3D 持平，多线程性能则翻倍；若搭配 DDR5，i7-14700K 则全面胜出。

这一事件反映出 AMD 经典芯片在升级换代周期中的独特号召力，同时也凸显了供应链与黄牛行为对消费者的挤压。对于潜在买家，目前不建议接受溢价黄牛价，建议持续关注 Newegg、Best Buy、B&H 等零售商的补货信息（AMD 官方商店尚未上架），或者考虑更具性价比的替代方案。

items.title: Qualcomm plans China-specific data center chips — new Dragonfly lineup will include nerfed AI accelerators that comply with export thresholds
items.description: Qualcomm has announced that it will bring all four of its Dragonfly data center product lines to China.
items.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 0 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Subscribe to our newsletter Qualcomm has announced that it will bring all four of its Dragonfly data center product lines to China, including custom AI accelerators engineered to stay below U.S. export thresholds, CEO Cristiano Amon told Nikkei Asia on the sidelines of the company's investor day in New York on Wednesday. China supplied 46% of Qualcomm's revenue in 2025, almost all of it from smartphone silicon, and Amon’s data center plan could revive the same export-compliant strategy that cut Nvidia's China accelerator sales to almost zero.Dragonfly covers AI accelerators, data center CPUs, custom silicon, and connectivity chips, and Amon said versions of every line will ship into China within the export rules. “We have versions of all of our products that comply with those guidelines,” he told Nikkei Asia, adding that Qualcomm is “engaged in conversations,” presumably with Chinese customers. The first accelerator, the AI250, is due next year and uses the company's HBC near-memory design instead of the HBM stacks that Nvidia and AMD racks rely on, a packaging choice that could pay off in a market where HBM is and will remain tight for the foreseeable future.Qualcomm told investors that the data center unit is expected to generate $300 million this fiscal year and $5 billion in fiscal year 2027, figures the company designates as the early ramp of a total addressable market it projects will exceed $1 trillion by 2029. The push into China relies on Amon's argument that Qualcomm's existing relationships with Chinese phone makers and automakers extend to the data center, the same customer base behind its AI200 and AI250 inference accelerators announced last October.Latest Videos FromWatch full video here: China, however, isn’t a neutral buyer for Qualcomm at the moment: The country’s market regulator opened an antitrust investigation into its Autotalks acquisition in October, and has pressed domestic data center operators to source at least 50% of their chips locally while steering Alibaba, ByteDance, and Tencent toward Huawei and Cambricon parts.Those dynamics have already gutted the export-compliant model that Qualcomm is looking to emulate. Nvidia’s H20, for example — the part it built specifically for China — had generated only about $50 million by late last year, and CEO Jensen Huang has said Nvidia has “zero” China market share left. Qualcomm is entering that lane voluntarily with hardware that won’t reach customers until at least fiscal year 2027, by which point Huawei's Ascend line and Cambricon's accelerators are scheduled to scale production well past current volumes. You may like China's homegrown silicon suppliers gain traction as Nvidia struggles to get its chips into the market Huawei could seize China’s AI chip crown in 2026 as Nvidia’s H200 shipments stall in regulatory limbo Nvidia market share in China falls to less than 60% Qualcomm has at least one confirmed buyer outside China, with Saudi Arabia's Humain already taking delivery of AI100 systems and committing to 200MW of Qualcomm racks. Inside China, the company still has to convince customers that Beijing is pushing away from foreign silicon. Follow Tom's Hardware on Google News, or add us as a preferred source, to get our latest news, analysis, & reviews in your feeds.Stay On the Cutting Edge: Get the Tom's Hardware NewsletterGet Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox.Contact me with news and offers from other Future brandsReceive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsors
items.author: Luke James
items.titleZh: 高通计划为中国定制数据中心芯片——新款Dragonfly系列将包含符合出口门槛的降级版AI加速器
items.descriptionZh:
高通CEO克里斯蒂亚诺·阿蒙在纽约投资者日上宣布，将把旗下全部四款“蜻蜓”（Dragonfly）数据中心产品线引入中国市场，包括专门设计的、低于美国出口阈值的定制AI加速器。这一战略背景是：2025财年中国贡献了高通46%的营收，几乎全部来自智能手机芯片，而阿蒙希望通过数据中心业务复制英伟达曾经尝试、但最终失败的出口合规策略——后者对华加速器销售几乎归零。

蜻蜓产品线涵盖AI加速器、数据中心CPU、定制芯片和连接芯片。阿蒙表示，每条产品线都有符合出口规则的版本将进入中国，并且高通已“展开对话”，暗示正在与中国客户接洽。首款加速器AI250预计明年推出，其核心技术创新在于采用高通自研的HBC（近内存计算）设计，而非英伟达和AMD机架依赖的HBM（高带宽内存）堆叠方案。这一封装选择在当前HBM供应持续紧张的背景下尤为务实，既能规避供应链瓶颈，又可能成为差异化竞争优势。

性能与市场策略方面，高通向投资者透露，数据中心部门本财年预计收入3亿美元，2027财年目标50亿美元，而整个可寻址市场规模预计到2029年将超过1万亿美元。高通试图将与中国手机和汽车厂商的既有客户关系延伸至数据中心，这些客户正是其去年10月发布的AI200和AI250推理加速器的潜在用户。然而，中国当前并非高通的中立买家：市场监管总局已于10月对高通收购Autotalks案发起反垄断调查，同时要求国内数据中心运营商至少50%的芯片实现本地化采购，并引导阿里巴巴、字节跳动和腾讯转向华为昇腾和寒武纪的产品。

英伟达的遭遇是一个警示信号：其专为中国打造的H20加速器截至去年底仅产生约5000万美元收入，CEO黄仁勋坦言英伟达在中国市场份额已“归零”。高通明知此路艰难，仍自愿进入这一赛道，但其硬件至少要到2027财年才能交付客户。届时，华为昇腾系列和寒武纪加速器预计已大规模量产，产能远超当前水平。因此，高通的胜负手在于能否凭借与本土科技巨头的长期关系、以及HBC近内存设计带来的成本和供应稳定性，在政策壁垒中找到窗口。目前高通已在中国以外确认一位买家：沙特Human公司已接收AI100系统并承诺部署200MW规模的高通机架。在中国内地，高通仍需说服客户——尤其是正被政策引导远离外国芯片的阿里、字节和腾讯——选择其方案。

items.title: Steam Machines will only come with one 16GB stick of RAM — company may change this to two 8GB sticks in the future, but the first batch of consoles is limited to single-channel memory
items.description: Valve confirmed to Gamers Nexus that the first batch of Steam Machines will only have one 16GB RAM stick. This would have a negative effect on the console's performance, but the company likely did this to keep its price as low as possible, or because it's the only available option left for the company.
items.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 13 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Subscribe to our newsletter Valve has confirmed that the first batch of Steam Machines will only come with a single stick of 16GB RAM, limiting the device to single-channel memory. The company confirmed this in a correction to Gamers Nexus (GN), after its engineers initially said that Steam Machines could either come with a single 16GB stick or two 8GB sticks. “We misspoke here,” Valve wrote in its email to the media channel. “All units will actually have one 16GB stick of RAM.”Tests have shown that using single-channel memory can reduce performance by about 9% to 13% compared to dual-channel memory, meaning gamers will feel the difference, especially in 1% lows. This is especially hard on the Steam Machine, which uses already aging hardware — a semi-custom AMD Zen 4 CPU and RDNA3 graphics with only 8GB of GDDR6 VRAM. Note that AMD launched Zen 5 in 2024, while the RDNA4 GPUs dropped in early 2025. We also already have details for Zen 6 CPUs and have heard rumors that RDNA5 GPUs will arrive next year.However, the company probably made this decision to keep the costs for the Steam Machine as low as possible. The device’s $1,049 base price is already steeper than what many are willing to pay for — an estimated $300+ price increase from the $700 to $750 target price that Valve presumably targeted. While its engineers did not confirm these numbers, they also said that the Steam Machine would have gotten a “probably similar” price hike to the one the Steam Deck experienced recently. Nevertheless, there is hope that later batches will have dual-channel memory, with Valve telling GN that there is a chance of this happening in the future.Latest Videos FromWatch full video here: This is another blow to the much-awaited living room PC console that is supposed to finally give PC gamers a chance to enjoy their Steam library with a console-like experience. Valve originally announced the Steam Machine and the Steam Controller in November last year, which was also around the same time that memory chips have started to be in short supply due to the massive demand from AI hyperscalers. The device was originally slated to launch in the first quarter of 2026, but the ongoing memory crisis forced Valve to hold off until it finally released the console this summer.Although having only a single stick of RAM is a disadvantage to any system, more optimistic gamers can consider this a boon as they could easily upgrade the console to 32GB if they have an extra matching 16GB DDR5-5600 SODIMM stick lying around at home (or are willing to spend extra to buy one). Upgrading the console’s RAM is a rather involved affair, though, requiring you to remove a lot of components and sub-boards just to reach the RAM slots. But if you’re the adventurous kind and could score a good deal on laptop RAM, this might be a viable solution to getting more performance out of your Steam Machine. You may like Valve Steam Machine price hike similar to Steam Deck's 45% increase, company confirms New 'HUDIMM' test shows nearly 50% reduction in memory throughput with single subchannel DDR5 Anbernic's retro gaming handhelds are quietly losing RAM capacity and being downgraded to older LPDDR3 memory Follow Tom's Hardware on Google News, or add us as a preferred source, to get our latest news, analysis, & reviews in your feeds.Stay On the Cutting Edge: Get the Tom's Hardware NewsletterGet Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox.Contact me with news and offers from other Future brandsReceive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsors
items.author: Jowi Morales
items.titleZh: Steam Machines仅配备一根16GB内存条——未来公司或将改为两根8GB内存条，但首批主机仅限单通道内存。
items.descriptionZh:
Valve 正式确认，首批 Steam Machines 将仅配备一根 16GB 内存条，这意味着设备将运行在单通道内存模式下。此前该公司工程师曾向 Gamers Nexus（GN）透露，Steam Machines 可能提供单根 16GB 或双根 8GB 两种配置，但 Valve 随后在致电该媒体频道的邮件中更正了这一说法：“我们之前说错了，实际上所有设备都将配备一根 16GB 内存条。”

测试数据显示，相比双通道内存，单通道内存会导致游戏性能下降约 9% 至 13%，尤其是在 1% 最低帧率方面，玩家可以明显感受到卡顿差异。这对 Steam Machines 而言尤为不利，因为其采用的基础硬件已经偏旧——搭载半定制 AMD Zen 4 CPU 和 RDNA3 图形核心，且显存仅有 8GB GDDR6。要知道，AMD 在 2024 年已推出 Zen 5，RDNA4 GPU 也在 2025 年初上市，甚至连 Zen 6 和 RDNA5 都已进入传闻阶段。

Valve 选择单通道内存，很可能是在尽力控制成本。Steam Machines 的起售价已达 1049 美元，这比此前预期 700 至 750 美元的目标价格高出约 300 美元以上。尽管工程师未确认具体涨幅数字，但他们表示 Steam Machines 经历了与 Steam Deck 近期类似的涨价幅度。不过，玩家有望在后续批次中看到双通道内存配置——Valve 告诉 GN，未来批次存在升级的可能性。

这一消息对等待已久的客厅 PC 游戏主机来说又是一记重创。Steam Machines 本应让 PC 玩家能以类似游戏主机的体验在客厅畅玩 Steam 库中的游戏。Valve 最早于去年 11 月宣布了 Steam Machines 和 Steam Controller，当时恰逢 AI 超大规模计算需求导致内存芯片开始短缺。原定 2026 年第一季度发售的计划，也因持续的内存危机而被推迟到今年夏天。

尽管单根内存条对任何系统都是不利的，但乐观的玩家可以将其视为一个机会：如果家中恰好有多余的匹配 16GB DDR5-5600 SODIMM 内存条（或愿意额外购买一根），就可以轻松升级到 32GB 容量。不过升级过程相当繁琐——需要拆除大量组件和子板才能触碰到内存插槽。但对于喜欢动手且能找到好价笔记本电脑内存的玩家来说，这仍是提升 Steam Machines 性能的可行方案。

items.title: Qualcomm reveals HBC near-memory AI architecture, AI250 and AI350 accelerators — touts 6x higher bandwidth-per-watt compared to HBM, 200x capacity compared to on-chip SRAM
items.description: Qualcomm unveils HBC near-memory AI architecture, claims it has broken the memory wall.
items.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 2 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Subscribe to our newsletter The so-called memory wall is a major performance limiter for many AI workloads, and high bandwidth memory (HBM) is not always a panacea since compute capability is growing faster than memory bandwidth. Qualcomm on Wednesday introduced its HBC near-memory compute architecture called high-bandwidth compute (HBC) that is designed to break the memory wall and enable the performance of certain AI workloads to scale linearly.Qualcomm's approach to near-memory compute is pretty much straightforward: the company disaggregates the AI accelerator from the system-on-chip (SoC) and puts it under the LPDDR DRAM stack. The HBC accelerator connects to the LPDDR stack using through-silicon vias to provide maximum bandwidth and capacity without using expensive HBM memory and advanced packaging. Qualcomm does not disclose the actual bandwidth HBC provides, though the company claims that it offers 6X higher bandwidth-per-watt compared to HBM and over 200X capacity compared to on-chip SRAM. (Image credit: Qualcomm)"We have separated the AI accelerator from the XPU and placed the XPU directly beneath a DRAM stack," said Tony Pialis, Executive Vice President and General Manager of Data Center Business at Qualcomm. "This is very important because it gives us the performance advantages of SRAM with the density and capacity of stacked memory. In effect, the congestion associated with HBM is gone. The value to the industry is lower power consumption, less heat, and the elimination of the costly silicon interposer used by HBM solutions. We can also deploy multiple HBC stacks within a single compute device using standard packaging, which delivers a significant performance-per-cost advantage."Latest Videos FromWatch full video here: Putting DRAM on logic or next to logic is nothing new. All DRAM makers have experimented with near-memory compute architectures, but have failed to make them popular. More recently, GUC, a fabless ASIC design service company, proposed its DRAM-on-Logic (DoL) technology that places one to four DRAM layers on top of logic to get around 5 TB/s of memory bandwidth and offer higher performance than some HBM3E memory subsystems without using expensive advanced packaging and HBM3E stacks.Since Qualcomm does not disclose actual performance numbers, it is hard to compare its HBC to GUC's offering. However, the biggest caveat about HBC is that Qualcomm does not tell us what the HBC accelerator actually does. In theory, it could be everything: a transformer-specific near-memory engine, a more general array of tensor cores, or some kind of preprocessing logic for AI inference or training. You may like SK hynix unveils 'iHBM' thermal architecture that cools AI memory at the source Samsung shows first HBM5 mockup with Heat Path Block cooling NEO Semiconductor's revolutionary 3D X-DRAM for AI processors has passed proof-of-concept validation (Image credit: Qualcomm)Along with its HBC technology, Qualcomm also disclosed its HBC roadmap. While the company's AI200 accelerator, due later this year, will rely on LPDDR5X and offer 43 TB of RAM per rack, its successor AI250 will rely on the 1st Generation HBC that will offer 18X bandwidth of AI200. The AI300 will use 2nd Generation HBC that will provide 54X bandwidth of AI300. Follow Tom's Hardware on Google News, or add us as a preferred source, to get our latest news, analysis, & reviews in your feeds.Stay On the Cutting Edge: Get the Tom's Hardware NewsletterGet Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox.Contact me with news and offers from other Future brandsReceive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsors
items.author: Anton Shilov
items.titleZh: 高通发布HBC近内存AI架构、AI250和AI350加速器 — 号称每瓦带宽比HBM高6倍，容量比片上SRAM高200倍
items.descriptionZh:
“内存墙”一直是制约AI工作负载性能的主要瓶颈，高带宽内存（HBM）也并非万能——计算能力的增长速度远超内存带宽的扩展速度。为此，高通于本周三推出了名为“高带宽计算”（High-Bandwidth Compute，HBC）的近存计算架构，旨在打破内存墙，使特定AI工作负载的性能实现线性扩展。

高通的近存计算方案思路直截了当：公司将AI加速器从系统级芯片（SoC）中解耦出来，直接放置在LPDDR DRAM堆叠的下方。HBC加速器通过硅通孔（TSV）与LPDDR堆叠相连，从而在不使用昂贵的HBM内存和先进封装技术的前提下，获得最大带宽和容量。高通并未透露HBC的具体带宽数值，但声称其每瓦带宽是HBM的6倍，且容量是片上SRAM的200倍以上。

高通数据中心业务执行副总裁兼总经理Tony Pialis表示：“我们将AI加速器从XPU中分离出来，并将XPU直接放置在DRAM堆叠下方。这一点非常重要，因为它让我们同时获得了SRAM的性能优势以及堆叠内存的密度和容量优势。实际上，HBM所伴生的拥塞问题不复存在。对行业而言，其价值在于更低的功耗、更少的热量，以及省去HBM方案所需的昂贵硅中介层。我们还可以在单个计算设备中部署多个HBC堆叠，仅使用标准封装即可实现显著的性能成本优势。”

将DRAM置于逻辑层之上或旁边并非新鲜事。所有DRAM厂商都曾尝试过近存计算架构，但均未能使其普及。最近，无晶圆厂ASIC设计服务公司GUC提出了“DRAM-on-Logic”（DoL）技术，将一至四层DRAM放置在逻辑层之上，可提供约5 TB/s的内存带宽，并在不使用昂贵先进封装和HBM3E堆叠的情况下，实现优于某些HBM3E内存子系统的性能。

由于高通未披露具体的性能数据，目前很难将其HBC与GUC的方案进行直接比较。然而，HBC最大的不确定因素在于：高通并未说明HBC加速器究竟执行什么任务。理论上，它可以是多种形态：专用于Transformer的近存引擎、更通用的张量核心阵列，或是用于AI推理或训练的某种预处理逻辑。

伴随HBC技术的发布，高通还公布了其HBC路线图。该公司今年晚些时候推出的AI200加速器将依赖LPDDR5X，每机架提供43 TB内存；其后续产品AI250将采用第一代HBC，带宽为AI200的18倍；而AI300将采用第二代HBC，带宽进一步提升至AI250的54倍。

items.title: Facebook’s Creator Studio has been revived as an AI companion app
items.description:
This is what the new Creator Studio app looks like, after the original service was shuttered in 2023. | Image: Meta	

Meta is bringing back the Facebook Creator Studio page manager, now "reimagined" as a standalone AI companion app. The new app aims to make it easier for creators to connect with their audiences and show them "exactly how to grow on Facebook," according to Meta's announcement.
Meta's AI Creator Assistant is a central focus of the newly reimagined app - users can ask the chatbot to provide performance tracking insights and tailored recommendations for improving engagement. It can also be used to find "the most important comments" left by the user's audience and "instantly draft replies in your voice."
The Creator Studio app isn't widely ava …
Read the full story at The Verge.
items.content: Meta is bringing back the Facebook Creator Studio page manager, now “reimagined” as a standalone AI companion app. The new app aims to make it easier for creators to connect with their audiences and show them “exactly how to grow on Facebook,” according to Meta’s announcement.Meta’s AI Creator Assistant is a central focus of the newly reimagined app — users can ask the chatbot to provide performance tracking insights and tailored recommendations for improving engagement. It can also be used to find “the most important comments” left by the user’s audience and “instantly draft replies in your voice.”Nothing says authentic community engagement like getting an AI chatbot to respond to all your comments for you. Image: MetaThe Creator Studio app isn’t widely available yet, with TechCrunch reporting that Meta is currently testing it with “select creators.” There’s no mention of when it’ll roll out to everyone, but Facebook creators can join a waitlist to get early access. The original Creator Studio experience was shut down in 2023, in favor of pushing users to Meta’s more comprehensive Business Suite platform to manage their pages and schedule content.
items.author: Jess Weatherbed
items.titleZh: Facebook的创作者工作室已复活为AI伴侣应用
items.descriptionZh:
Meta 宣布重新推出 Facebook Creator Studio 页面管理器，并将其“重塑”为一款独立的 AI 伴侣应用。这款新应用旨在帮助创作者更轻松地与受众建立联系，并“精准展示如何在 Facebook 上实现增长”，根据 Meta 的官方公告。

新版应用的核心亮点是 Meta 的 AI 创作者助手（AI Creator Assistant）。用户可以向这个聊天机器人询问绩效跟踪洞察和量身定制的优化建议，以提升互动率。此外，它还能帮助创作者找到受众留下的“最重要评论”，并“立即以你的语气草拟回复”。Meta 强调，这并非用机器人替代真实互动，而是辅助创作者更高效地管理社区。

不过，Creator Studio 应用目前尚未广泛开放。据 TechCrunch 报道，Meta 正在“精选创作者”中进行测试。官方尚未公布全面上线的具体时间，但 Facebook 创作者可以申请加入候补名单，以获取早期访问权限。回顾历史，原版 Creator Studio 于 2023 年被关闭，当时 Meta 引导用户转向更全面的业务套件平台（Business Suite）来管理页面和安排内容。如今，这一独立应用的回归，标志着 Meta 在创作者工具战略上的再次调整，将 AI 能力作为核心驱动力，并聚焦于简化创作者的工作流程，包括内容管理、数据分析与粉丝互动。

history.title: Scalpers circle AMD's Ryzen 7 5800X3D 10th Anniversary Edition, asking for $600 or more — re-released CPU sees inconsistent inventory on release day
history.description: Scalpers are trying to capitalize on the release of the Ryzen 7 5800X3D 10th Anniversary Edition, asking nearly double the CPU's suggested retail price.
history.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 3 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Subscribe to our newsletter Scalpers are moving in on AMD's Ryzen 7 5800X3D 10th Anniversary Edition. The new CPU, which is identical to the original but "re-engineered" for a new bonding process, is on sale officially today, June 29. We've been keeping track of inventory and haven't seen the chip available for more than a few minutes — and amid the flurry, scalpers are stepping in and asking for $600 or more for the chip on the secondhand market, sometimes doubling the CPU's $350 MSRP.Go deeper with TH Premium: CPU (Image credit: Tom's Hardware)CPU scaling with DLSSRyzen to the top: How AMD innovated in the gaming CPU marketHow ARM is working its way into PCsAMD CES 2026 gaming trends press Q&A roundtable transcriptOver on eBay, most listings for the chip are above $600, with some asking for $750 or more. Worse, they've sold for that price. Looking at sold listings, at least two of the CPUs sold today, one for $540 and another for $585. Most of the listings just use the stock product photo, but some scalpers have an actual CPU in-hand.Micro Center has the chip available for sale, though only as part of a bundle with a motherboard and RAM, and it's exclusively available in Micro Center stores. Presumably some scalpers went to buy a chip at Micro Center this morning to flip it on eBay in the afternoon.Latest Videos FromWatch full video here: Although it's easy to get caught up in the rush of a new release (or old release, in this case), we don't recommend giving into scalper prices. Rumors have circulated that the 10th Anniversary Edition is a limited-time run, but that's not the case. AMD says it plans on continuing to make the CPU, so we should see inventory stabilize eventually.We have some placeholder listings available. Again, we've seen inconsistent inventory throughout the morning, so check back at these retailers regularly: You may like Ryzen 7 5800X3D AM4 10th Anniversary Edition surfaces online for $310 AMD to resurrect Ryzen 7 5800X3D AM4 with 10th anniversary edition, leaker claims AMD brings back Ryzen 7 5800X3D, launches Ryzen 7 7700X3D to combat rising component prices 5800X3D 10th Anniversary Edition at Newegg5800X3D 10th Anniversary Edition at Best Buy5800X3D 10th Anniversary Edition at B&HWe've been checking retailer listings all morning, and we've only briefly seen the chip in stock. Online, some buyers claim they've secured a CPU through Newegg, but we haven't been able to successfully move through the checkout process yet. We also haven't seen the chip go live on AMD's direct web store yet.Because of that, it looks like retailers are doing something of a staggered rollout. There's a good chance we'll see more inventory released throughout the day, so make sure to check back at retailers.Stay On the Cutting Edge: Get the Tom's Hardware NewsletterGet Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox.Contact me with news and offers from other Future brandsReceive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsorsWe just re-reviewed the Ryzen 7 5800X3D to evaluate how the CPU stacks up to the current market at its new $350 suggested retail price. If you already have an AM4 motherboard and memory to go with the CPU, it's a good choice at $350. Otherwise, there are better options.AMD's newer Ryzen 7 7600X3D is just as fast in applications, despite sporting fewer cores, and it's around 15% faster in games. Meanwhile, Intel's Core i7-14700K paired with DDR4 matches the 5800X3D in games and offers around twice the multithreaded performance. With DDR5, the Core i7-14700K wins across the board. Follow Tom's Hardware on Google News, or add us as a preferred source, to get our latest news, analysis, & reviews in your feeds.
history.author: Jake Roach
history.titleZh: 黄牛围猎AMD锐龙7 5800X3D十周年纪念版，要价600美元或更高——重新发布的CPU在发布日库存不稳定
history.descriptionZh:
AMD 今日正式开售 Ryzen 7 5800X3D 十周年纪念版处理器，这款芯片本质上是原版 Ryzen 7 5800X3D 的重新封装版本，采用新的键合工艺制造，但核心规格与性能参数完全一致。官方建议零售价为 350 美元。然而，上市仅数小时，该处理器便遭遇严重抢购，库存迅速告罄，黄牛党随即在二手市场大肆炒作，eBay 上的标价普遍超过 600 美元，部分高达 750 美元，甚至已有以 540 美元和 585 美元成交的记录。Micro Center 虽然提供该芯片，但仅限店内以主板+内存捆绑套餐形式销售，这进一步加剧了线上渠道的稀缺性。

从技术原理来看，Ryzen 7 5800X3D 的核心创新在于其 3D V-Cache 技术，通过垂直堆叠额外的 64MB L3 缓存（总计 96MB），显著降低游戏场景中的内存延迟，提升数据命中率。十周年纪念版与此前版本完全一致，只是 AMD 针对新的键合工艺进行了重新工程化设计，以确保长期供应稳定性。AMD 已明确表示这款处理器并非限时生产，而是计划持续量产，因此库存预计将逐步恢复稳定。

性能方面，Tom's Hardware 近期重新评测了 Ryzen 7 5800X3D 在当前市场环境下的表现。在 350 美元价位上，如果用户已有 AM4 主板和 DDR4 内存，它仍然是一个高性价比的游戏选择。但若需要全新搭建平台，则存在更优选项：AMD 自家的 Ryzen 7 7600X3D 尽管核心数更少，应用性能与之持平，游戏性能却高出约 15%；而 Intel 的 Core i7-14700K 搭配 DDR4 内存在游戏中与 5800X3D 持平，多线程性能则翻倍；若搭配 DDR5，i7-14700K 则全面胜出。

这一事件反映出 AMD 经典芯片在升级换代周期中的独特号召力，同时也凸显了供应链与黄牛行为对消费者的挤压。对于潜在买家，目前不建议接受溢价黄牛价，建议持续关注 Newegg、Best Buy、B&H 等零售商的补货信息（AMD 官方商店尚未上架），或者考虑更具性价比的替代方案。

history.title: Qualcomm plans China-specific data center chips — new Dragonfly lineup will include nerfed AI accelerators that comply with export thresholds
history.description: Qualcomm has announced that it will bring all four of its Dragonfly data center product lines to China.
history.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 0 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Subscribe to our newsletter Qualcomm has announced that it will bring all four of its Dragonfly data center product lines to China, including custom AI accelerators engineered to stay below U.S. export thresholds, CEO Cristiano Amon told Nikkei Asia on the sidelines of the company's investor day in New York on Wednesday. China supplied 46% of Qualcomm's revenue in 2025, almost all of it from smartphone silicon, and Amon’s data center plan could revive the same export-compliant strategy that cut Nvidia's China accelerator sales to almost zero.Dragonfly covers AI accelerators, data center CPUs, custom silicon, and connectivity chips, and Amon said versions of every line will ship into China within the export rules. “We have versions of all of our products that comply with those guidelines,” he told Nikkei Asia, adding that Qualcomm is “engaged in conversations,” presumably with Chinese customers. The first accelerator, the AI250, is due next year and uses the company's HBC near-memory design instead of the HBM stacks that Nvidia and AMD racks rely on, a packaging choice that could pay off in a market where HBM is and will remain tight for the foreseeable future.Qualcomm told investors that the data center unit is expected to generate $300 million this fiscal year and $5 billion in fiscal year 2027, figures the company designates as the early ramp of a total addressable market it projects will exceed $1 trillion by 2029. The push into China relies on Amon's argument that Qualcomm's existing relationships with Chinese phone makers and automakers extend to the data center, the same customer base behind its AI200 and AI250 inference accelerators announced last October.Latest Videos FromWatch full video here: China, however, isn’t a neutral buyer for Qualcomm at the moment: The country’s market regulator opened an antitrust investigation into its Autotalks acquisition in October, and has pressed domestic data center operators to source at least 50% of their chips locally while steering Alibaba, ByteDance, and Tencent toward Huawei and Cambricon parts.Those dynamics have already gutted the export-compliant model that Qualcomm is looking to emulate. Nvidia’s H20, for example — the part it built specifically for China — had generated only about $50 million by late last year, and CEO Jensen Huang has said Nvidia has “zero” China market share left. Qualcomm is entering that lane voluntarily with hardware that won’t reach customers until at least fiscal year 2027, by which point Huawei's Ascend line and Cambricon's accelerators are scheduled to scale production well past current volumes. You may like China's homegrown silicon suppliers gain traction as Nvidia struggles to get its chips into the market Huawei could seize China’s AI chip crown in 2026 as Nvidia’s H200 shipments stall in regulatory limbo Nvidia market share in China falls to less than 60% Qualcomm has at least one confirmed buyer outside China, with Saudi Arabia's Humain already taking delivery of AI100 systems and committing to 200MW of Qualcomm racks. Inside China, the company still has to convince customers that Beijing is pushing away from foreign silicon. Follow Tom's Hardware on Google News, or add us as a preferred source, to get our latest news, analysis, & reviews in your feeds.Stay On the Cutting Edge: Get the Tom's Hardware NewsletterGet Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox.Contact me with news and offers from other Future brandsReceive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsors
history.author: Luke James
history.titleZh: 高通计划为中国定制数据中心芯片——新款Dragonfly系列将包含符合出口门槛的降级版AI加速器
history.descriptionZh:
高通CEO克里斯蒂亚诺·阿蒙在纽约投资者日上宣布，将把旗下全部四款“蜻蜓”（Dragonfly）数据中心产品线引入中国市场，包括专门设计的、低于美国出口阈值的定制AI加速器。这一战略背景是：2025财年中国贡献了高通46%的营收，几乎全部来自智能手机芯片，而阿蒙希望通过数据中心业务复制英伟达曾经尝试、但最终失败的出口合规策略——后者对华加速器销售几乎归零。

蜻蜓产品线涵盖AI加速器、数据中心CPU、定制芯片和连接芯片。阿蒙表示，每条产品线都有符合出口规则的版本将进入中国，并且高通已“展开对话”，暗示正在与中国客户接洽。首款加速器AI250预计明年推出，其核心技术创新在于采用高通自研的HBC（近内存计算）设计，而非英伟达和AMD机架依赖的HBM（高带宽内存）堆叠方案。这一封装选择在当前HBM供应持续紧张的背景下尤为务实，既能规避供应链瓶颈，又可能成为差异化竞争优势。

性能与市场策略方面，高通向投资者透露，数据中心部门本财年预计收入3亿美元，2027财年目标50亿美元，而整个可寻址市场规模预计到2029年将超过1万亿美元。高通试图将与中国手机和汽车厂商的既有客户关系延伸至数据中心，这些客户正是其去年10月发布的AI200和AI250推理加速器的潜在用户。然而，中国当前并非高通的中立买家：市场监管总局已于10月对高通收购Autotalks案发起反垄断调查，同时要求国内数据中心运营商至少50%的芯片实现本地化采购，并引导阿里巴巴、字节跳动和腾讯转向华为昇腾和寒武纪的产品。

英伟达的遭遇是一个警示信号：其专为中国打造的H20加速器截至去年底仅产生约5000万美元收入，CEO黄仁勋坦言英伟达在中国市场份额已“归零”。高通明知此路艰难，仍自愿进入这一赛道，但其硬件至少要到2027财年才能交付客户。届时，华为昇腾系列和寒武纪加速器预计已大规模量产，产能远超当前水平。因此，高通的胜负手在于能否凭借与本土科技巨头的长期关系、以及HBC近内存设计带来的成本和供应稳定性，在政策壁垒中找到窗口。目前高通已在中国以外确认一位买家：沙特Human公司已接收AI100系统并承诺部署200MW规模的高通机架。在中国内地，高通仍需说服客户——尤其是正被政策引导远离外国芯片的阿里、字节和腾讯——选择其方案。

history.title: Steam Machines will only come with one 16GB stick of RAM — company may change this to two 8GB sticks in the future, but the first batch of consoles is limited to single-channel memory
history.description: Valve confirmed to Gamers Nexus that the first batch of Steam Machines will only have one 16GB RAM stick. This would have a negative effect on the console's performance, but the company likely did this to keep its price as low as possible, or because it's the only available option left for the company.
history.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 13 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Subscribe to our newsletter Valve has confirmed that the first batch of Steam Machines will only come with a single stick of 16GB RAM, limiting the device to single-channel memory. The company confirmed this in a correction to Gamers Nexus (GN), after its engineers initially said that Steam Machines could either come with a single 16GB stick or two 8GB sticks. “We misspoke here,” Valve wrote in its email to the media channel. “All units will actually have one 16GB stick of RAM.”Tests have shown that using single-channel memory can reduce performance by about 9% to 13% compared to dual-channel memory, meaning gamers will feel the difference, especially in 1% lows. This is especially hard on the Steam Machine, which uses already aging hardware — a semi-custom AMD Zen 4 CPU and RDNA3 graphics with only 8GB of GDDR6 VRAM. Note that AMD launched Zen 5 in 2024, while the RDNA4 GPUs dropped in early 2025. We also already have details for Zen 6 CPUs and have heard rumors that RDNA5 GPUs will arrive next year.However, the company probably made this decision to keep the costs for the Steam Machine as low as possible. The device’s $1,049 base price is already steeper than what many are willing to pay for — an estimated $300+ price increase from the $700 to $750 target price that Valve presumably targeted. While its engineers did not confirm these numbers, they also said that the Steam Machine would have gotten a “probably similar” price hike to the one the Steam Deck experienced recently. Nevertheless, there is hope that later batches will have dual-channel memory, with Valve telling GN that there is a chance of this happening in the future.Latest Videos FromWatch full video here: This is another blow to the much-awaited living room PC console that is supposed to finally give PC gamers a chance to enjoy their Steam library with a console-like experience. Valve originally announced the Steam Machine and the Steam Controller in November last year, which was also around the same time that memory chips have started to be in short supply due to the massive demand from AI hyperscalers. The device was originally slated to launch in the first quarter of 2026, but the ongoing memory crisis forced Valve to hold off until it finally released the console this summer.Although having only a single stick of RAM is a disadvantage to any system, more optimistic gamers can consider this a boon as they could easily upgrade the console to 32GB if they have an extra matching 16GB DDR5-5600 SODIMM stick lying around at home (or are willing to spend extra to buy one). Upgrading the console’s RAM is a rather involved affair, though, requiring you to remove a lot of components and sub-boards just to reach the RAM slots. But if you’re the adventurous kind and could score a good deal on laptop RAM, this might be a viable solution to getting more performance out of your Steam Machine. You may like Valve Steam Machine price hike similar to Steam Deck's 45% increase, company confirms New 'HUDIMM' test shows nearly 50% reduction in memory throughput with single subchannel DDR5 Anbernic's retro gaming handhelds are quietly losing RAM capacity and being downgraded to older LPDDR3 memory Follow Tom's Hardware on Google News, or add us as a preferred source, to get our latest news, analysis, & reviews in your feeds.Stay On the Cutting Edge: Get the Tom's Hardware NewsletterGet Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox.Contact me with news and offers from other Future brandsReceive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsors
history.author: Jowi Morales
history.titleZh: Steam Machines仅配备一根16GB内存条——未来公司或将改为两根8GB内存条，但首批主机仅限单通道内存。
history.descriptionZh:
Valve 正式确认，首批 Steam Machines 将仅配备一根 16GB 内存条，这意味着设备将运行在单通道内存模式下。此前该公司工程师曾向 Gamers Nexus（GN）透露，Steam Machines 可能提供单根 16GB 或双根 8GB 两种配置，但 Valve 随后在致电该媒体频道的邮件中更正了这一说法：“我们之前说错了，实际上所有设备都将配备一根 16GB 内存条。”

测试数据显示，相比双通道内存，单通道内存会导致游戏性能下降约 9% 至 13%，尤其是在 1% 最低帧率方面，玩家可以明显感受到卡顿差异。这对 Steam Machines 而言尤为不利，因为其采用的基础硬件已经偏旧——搭载半定制 AMD Zen 4 CPU 和 RDNA3 图形核心，且显存仅有 8GB GDDR6。要知道，AMD 在 2024 年已推出 Zen 5，RDNA4 GPU 也在 2025 年初上市，甚至连 Zen 6 和 RDNA5 都已进入传闻阶段。

Valve 选择单通道内存，很可能是在尽力控制成本。Steam Machines 的起售价已达 1049 美元，这比此前预期 700 至 750 美元的目标价格高出约 300 美元以上。尽管工程师未确认具体涨幅数字，但他们表示 Steam Machines 经历了与 Steam Deck 近期类似的涨价幅度。不过，玩家有望在后续批次中看到双通道内存配置——Valve 告诉 GN，未来批次存在升级的可能性。

这一消息对等待已久的客厅 PC 游戏主机来说又是一记重创。Steam Machines 本应让 PC 玩家能以类似游戏主机的体验在客厅畅玩 Steam 库中的游戏。Valve 最早于去年 11 月宣布了 Steam Machines 和 Steam Controller，当时恰逢 AI 超大规模计算需求导致内存芯片开始短缺。原定 2026 年第一季度发售的计划，也因持续的内存危机而被推迟到今年夏天。

尽管单根内存条对任何系统都是不利的，但乐观的玩家可以将其视为一个机会：如果家中恰好有多余的匹配 16GB DDR5-5600 SODIMM 内存条（或愿意额外购买一根），就可以轻松升级到 32GB 容量。不过升级过程相当繁琐——需要拆除大量组件和子板才能触碰到内存插槽。但对于喜欢动手且能找到好价笔记本电脑内存的玩家来说，这仍是提升 Steam Machines 性能的可行方案。

history.title: Qualcomm reveals HBC near-memory AI architecture, AI250 and AI350 accelerators — touts 6x higher bandwidth-per-watt compared to HBM, 200x capacity compared to on-chip SRAM
history.description: Qualcomm unveils HBC near-memory AI architecture, claims it has broken the memory wall.
history.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 2 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Subscribe to our newsletter The so-called memory wall is a major performance limiter for many AI workloads, and high bandwidth memory (HBM) is not always a panacea since compute capability is growing faster than memory bandwidth. Qualcomm on Wednesday introduced its HBC near-memory compute architecture called high-bandwidth compute (HBC) that is designed to break the memory wall and enable the performance of certain AI workloads to scale linearly.Qualcomm's approach to near-memory compute is pretty much straightforward: the company disaggregates the AI accelerator from the system-on-chip (SoC) and puts it under the LPDDR DRAM stack. The HBC accelerator connects to the LPDDR stack using through-silicon vias to provide maximum bandwidth and capacity without using expensive HBM memory and advanced packaging. Qualcomm does not disclose the actual bandwidth HBC provides, though the company claims that it offers 6X higher bandwidth-per-watt compared to HBM and over 200X capacity compared to on-chip SRAM. (Image credit: Qualcomm)"We have separated the AI accelerator from the XPU and placed the XPU directly beneath a DRAM stack," said Tony Pialis, Executive Vice President and General Manager of Data Center Business at Qualcomm. "This is very important because it gives us the performance advantages of SRAM with the density and capacity of stacked memory. In effect, the congestion associated with HBM is gone. The value to the industry is lower power consumption, less heat, and the elimination of the costly silicon interposer used by HBM solutions. We can also deploy multiple HBC stacks within a single compute device using standard packaging, which delivers a significant performance-per-cost advantage."Latest Videos FromWatch full video here: Putting DRAM on logic or next to logic is nothing new. All DRAM makers have experimented with near-memory compute architectures, but have failed to make them popular. More recently, GUC, a fabless ASIC design service company, proposed its DRAM-on-Logic (DoL) technology that places one to four DRAM layers on top of logic to get around 5 TB/s of memory bandwidth and offer higher performance than some HBM3E memory subsystems without using expensive advanced packaging and HBM3E stacks.Since Qualcomm does not disclose actual performance numbers, it is hard to compare its HBC to GUC's offering. However, the biggest caveat about HBC is that Qualcomm does not tell us what the HBC accelerator actually does. In theory, it could be everything: a transformer-specific near-memory engine, a more general array of tensor cores, or some kind of preprocessing logic for AI inference or training. You may like SK hynix unveils 'iHBM' thermal architecture that cools AI memory at the source Samsung shows first HBM5 mockup with Heat Path Block cooling NEO Semiconductor's revolutionary 3D X-DRAM for AI processors has passed proof-of-concept validation (Image credit: Qualcomm)Along with its HBC technology, Qualcomm also disclosed its HBC roadmap. While the company's AI200 accelerator, due later this year, will rely on LPDDR5X and offer 43 TB of RAM per rack, its successor AI250 will rely on the 1st Generation HBC that will offer 18X bandwidth of AI200. The AI300 will use 2nd Generation HBC that will provide 54X bandwidth of AI300. Follow Tom's Hardware on Google News, or add us as a preferred source, to get our latest news, analysis, & reviews in your feeds.Stay On the Cutting Edge: Get the Tom's Hardware NewsletterGet Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox.Contact me with news and offers from other Future brandsReceive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsors
history.author: Anton Shilov
history.titleZh: 高通发布HBC近内存AI架构、AI250和AI350加速器 — 号称每瓦带宽比HBM高6倍，容量比片上SRAM高200倍
history.descriptionZh:
“内存墙”一直是制约AI工作负载性能的主要瓶颈，高带宽内存（HBM）也并非万能——计算能力的增长速度远超内存带宽的扩展速度。为此，高通于本周三推出了名为“高带宽计算”（High-Bandwidth Compute，HBC）的近存计算架构，旨在打破内存墙，使特定AI工作负载的性能实现线性扩展。

高通的近存计算方案思路直截了当：公司将AI加速器从系统级芯片（SoC）中解耦出来，直接放置在LPDDR DRAM堆叠的下方。HBC加速器通过硅通孔（TSV）与LPDDR堆叠相连，从而在不使用昂贵的HBM内存和先进封装技术的前提下，获得最大带宽和容量。高通并未透露HBC的具体带宽数值，但声称其每瓦带宽是HBM的6倍，且容量是片上SRAM的200倍以上。

高通数据中心业务执行副总裁兼总经理Tony Pialis表示：“我们将AI加速器从XPU中分离出来，并将XPU直接放置在DRAM堆叠下方。这一点非常重要，因为它让我们同时获得了SRAM的性能优势以及堆叠内存的密度和容量优势。实际上，HBM所伴生的拥塞问题不复存在。对行业而言，其价值在于更低的功耗、更少的热量，以及省去HBM方案所需的昂贵硅中介层。我们还可以在单个计算设备中部署多个HBC堆叠，仅使用标准封装即可实现显著的性能成本优势。”

将DRAM置于逻辑层之上或旁边并非新鲜事。所有DRAM厂商都曾尝试过近存计算架构，但均未能使其普及。最近，无晶圆厂ASIC设计服务公司GUC提出了“DRAM-on-Logic”（DoL）技术，将一至四层DRAM放置在逻辑层之上，可提供约5 TB/s的内存带宽，并在不使用昂贵先进封装和HBM3E堆叠的情况下，实现优于某些HBM3E内存子系统的性能。

由于高通未披露具体的性能数据，目前很难将其HBC与GUC的方案进行直接比较。然而，HBC最大的不确定因素在于：高通并未说明HBC加速器究竟执行什么任务。理论上，它可以是多种形态：专用于Transformer的近存引擎、更通用的张量核心阵列，或是用于AI推理或训练的某种预处理逻辑。

伴随HBC技术的发布，高通还公布了其HBC路线图。该公司今年晚些时候推出的AI200加速器将依赖LPDDR5X，每机架提供43 TB内存；其后续产品AI250将采用第一代HBC，带宽为AI200的18倍；而AI300将采用第二代HBC，带宽进一步提升至AI250的54倍。

history.title: Facebook’s Creator Studio has been revived as an AI companion app
history.description:
This is what the new Creator Studio app looks like, after the original service was shuttered in 2023. | Image: Meta	

Meta is bringing back the Facebook Creator Studio page manager, now "reimagined" as a standalone AI companion app. The new app aims to make it easier for creators to connect with their audiences and show them "exactly how to grow on Facebook," according to Meta's announcement.
Meta's AI Creator Assistant is a central focus of the newly reimagined app - users can ask the chatbot to provide performance tracking insights and tailored recommendations for improving engagement. It can also be used to find "the most important comments" left by the user's audience and "instantly draft replies in your voice."
The Creator Studio app isn't widely ava …
Read the full story at The Verge.
history.content: Meta is bringing back the Facebook Creator Studio page manager, now “reimagined” as a standalone AI companion app. The new app aims to make it easier for creators to connect with their audiences and show them “exactly how to grow on Facebook,” according to Meta’s announcement.Meta’s AI Creator Assistant is a central focus of the newly reimagined app — users can ask the chatbot to provide performance tracking insights and tailored recommendations for improving engagement. It can also be used to find “the most important comments” left by the user’s audience and “instantly draft replies in your voice.”Nothing says authentic community engagement like getting an AI chatbot to respond to all your comments for you. Image: MetaThe Creator Studio app isn’t widely available yet, with TechCrunch reporting that Meta is currently testing it with “select creators.” There’s no mention of when it’ll roll out to everyone, but Facebook creators can join a waitlist to get early access. The original Creator Studio experience was shut down in 2023, in favor of pushing users to Meta’s more comprehensive Business Suite platform to manage their pages and schedule content.
history.author: Jess Weatherbed
history.titleZh: Facebook的创作者工作室已复活为AI伴侣应用
history.descriptionZh:
Meta 宣布重新推出 Facebook Creator Studio 页面管理器，并将其“重塑”为一款独立的 AI 伴侣应用。这款新应用旨在帮助创作者更轻松地与受众建立联系，并“精准展示如何在 Facebook 上实现增长”，根据 Meta 的官方公告。

新版应用的核心亮点是 Meta 的 AI 创作者助手（AI Creator Assistant）。用户可以向这个聊天机器人询问绩效跟踪洞察和量身定制的优化建议，以提升互动率。此外，它还能帮助创作者找到受众留下的“最重要评论”，并“立即以你的语气草拟回复”。Meta 强调，这并非用机器人替代真实互动，而是辅助创作者更高效地管理社区。

不过，Creator Studio 应用目前尚未广泛开放。据 TechCrunch 报道，Meta 正在“精选创作者”中进行测试。官方尚未公布全面上线的具体时间，但 Facebook 创作者可以申请加入候补名单，以获取早期访问权限。回顾历史，原版 Creator Studio 于 2023 年被关闭，当时 Meta 引导用户转向更全面的业务套件平台（Business Suite）来管理页面和安排内容。如今，这一独立应用的回归，标志着 Meta 在创作者工具战略上的再次调整，将 AI 能力作为核心驱动力，并聚焦于简化创作者的工作流程，包括内容管理、数据分析与粉丝互动。
